name: woc-autobot
description: Autonomous World of Claudecraft bot — standalone. Runtime needs only `ws` + the committed *.generated.mjs data. The game source is read ONLY at generation time (npm run gen), from GAME_SRC or the sibling ../../world-of-claudecraft.

scripts.gen: node scripts/gen_bot_mobs.mjs && node scripts/gen_bot_items.mjs && node scripts/gen_bot_vendors.mjs && node scripts/gen_bot_density.mjs && node scripts/gen_bot_dungeons.mjs && node scripts/gen_bot_abilities.mjs && node scripts/check_gamedata.mjs --write
